 Grants a variety of effects when embedded in an equipment socket. Witches found in each region have the power to embed or remove Abyss gears. 
Frostward I is an Abyss Core in Crimson Desert. Abyss Cores, also referred to as Abyss Gear items, are special upgrade items that can be socketed into Weapons or Armor to grant additional Effects, Stats, or Skills. They can be obtained through Sealed Abyss Artifact challenges, as quest rewards, or by crafting and purchasing them through the appropriate systems in the game.

### Selling Items to Vendors in Crimson Desert

 
 As mentioned earlier, you can sell unwanted items to vendors in exchange for copper or silver. This is a useful way to earn money and build trust, especially when you obtain items such as recipes. Once a recipe is learned, it is permanently recorded in your Knowledge Journal, meaning the item itself is no longer needed. In most cases, it’s best to sell the extra copy for additional copper or silver.

 Stone with high density and few cracks. Its surface is smooth, and its texture is uniform, allowing for precise processing. It's used in decorations, constructing buildings, and statues. Commonly found near bodies of water and rock formations.

### Weapon Slots & Equipment System in Crimson Desert

 
 The game features a multi-slot equipment system divided into two main sections:

 
 Primary Weapon Slots (Top Section):

 
 
 - One slot is dedicated to Two-Handed Weapons (e.g., Greatswords).
 
 - Two additional slots are reserved for One-Handed Weapons (e.g., Swords, Maces, Shields).
 
 - Players can dual wield one-handed weapons or mix offensive and defensive options.
 
 - All equipped Weapons can be swapped in real time during combat.
 
 
 

 
 Utility & Ranged Slots (Bottom Section):

 
 
 - One slot is assigned to Daggers, which functions as a stealth tool rather than a standard weapon.
 
 - One slot is for Ranged Weapons (Bows, Firearms, Hand Cannons, etc.).
 
 - One slot is used for Ammunition Types, enabling differ

After clearing out the bandits, enter the camp. You'll first have to equip your lantern to scan the area for the memory fragment.
